scans.description: No irregular skin spots or high-contrast lesions were detected. The scanned skin area appears uniform, symmetric, and healthy. Ensure regular sun protection and continue to monitor your skin for any future changes.

No irregular skin spots or high-contrast lesions were detected. The scanned skin area appears uniform, symmetric, and healthy. Ensure regular sun protection and continue to monitor your skin for any future changes.
Small, circular, symmetric erythematous node detected. These features are typical of localized Acne Vulgaris. Maintain a clean, oil-controlled skincare routine.

ASYMMETRIC pigmented lesion detected with irregular borders and high color variance. These are standard visual biomarkers for Melanoma. Immediate medical consultation with a certified dermatologist is strongly recommended for a biopsy.

A common skin condition that occurs when hair follicles become plugged with oil and dead skin cells. It can be treated with proper skincare and medication.
A skin disease that causes a rash with itchy, scaly patches, most commonly on the knees, elbows, trunk and scalp. It's a chronic condition with no cure.

A serious form of skin cancer that develops in melanocytes. Early detection is crucial for successful treatment.
A condition that makes your skin red and itchy. It's common in children but can occur at any age.
A skin disease that causes a rash with itchy, scaly patches, most commonly on the knees, elbows, trunk and scalp.
